documents.title: Deployment Guide
documents.content:
# Deployment Guide

## Requirements
- JDK 21+
- Maven 3.9+
- PostgreSQL 12+

## Build
```bash
mvn clean package -DskipTests
```

## Run
```bash
java -jar target/service.jar --server.port=8083
```

## Verify
Access http://localhost:8083/ops/health

documents.title: Nginx Config
Database Backup
documents.content:
# Database Backup

## Backup
```bash
pg_dump -h 8.137.116.121 -p 8432 -U business business_db > backup.sql
```

## Restore
```bash
psql -h 8.137.116.121 -p 8432 -U business business_db < backup.sql
```

documents.title: DB Connection Timeout
documents.content:
# DB Connection Timeout

## Cause
1. Connection pool exhausted
2. Network issue
3. DB server load high

## Solution
1. Restart PostgreSQL
2. Check connection pool settings
3. Optimize slow queries

documents.title: Service Start Failed
documents.content:
# Service Start Failed

## Common Causes
1. Port in use
2. Config error
3. Dependency not running

## Debug
1. Check port: netstat -ano | findstr 8083
2. Check logs
3. Verify config

documents.title: Java Code Standards
documents.content:
# Java Code Standards

## Naming
- Classes: UpperCamelCase
- Methods: lowerCamelCase
- Constants: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE

## Format
- 4 spaces indent
- Max 120 chars per line

documents.title: Git Commit Standards
documents.content:
# Git Commit Standards

## Types
- feat: New feature
- fix: Bug fix
- docs: Documentation
- refactor: Code refactor

## Example
```bash
git commit -m "feat(user): add login feature"
```

documents.title: Service Outage Plan
documents.content:
# Service Outage Response

## Severity Levels
- P1: Critical (15min)
- P2: Major (30min)
- Minor (2hours)

## Process
1. Detect
2. Confirm
3. Respond
4. Resolve
5. Review
